email.subject: Urgent: Verify your PayPal account immediately
email.body:
Dear Customer,

Your PayPal account has been flagged for suspicious activity. Please verify your account by clicking the link below to avoid account suspension.

Click here to verify: http://paypa1-verify.com/verify?session=abc123

This is urgent - your account will be locked in 24 hours if not verified.

email.subject: Your Amazon order #123-4567890 has shipped
email.body:
Your order has been shipped!

Track your package at: https://amazon.com/orders/123-4567890

Expected delivery: 2025-04-25

Thank you for your purchase!

email.subject: Action Required: Update your Apple ID security
email.body:
Apple Security Alert

We noticed unusual sign-in activity on your Apple ID. To protect your account, please verify your identity by confirming your password.

Click to confirm: http://apple-support.net/verify

Apple Support Team

email.subject: New sign-in from Chrome on Windows
email.body:
Hi user@example.com,

Someone just signed in to your GitHub account from:
Browser: Chrome
Operating System: Windows
IP Address: 203.0.113.42

If this wasn't you, please review your account security settings: https://github.com/settings/security

GitHub

email.subject: Confirm your Microsoft account - Important
email.body:
We have detected unusual activity on your Microsoft account. Please confirm your identity within the next 24 hours to restore full access.

Confirm Identity: http://microsoft-account.com/verify/aUd9xZ

Failure to confirm may result in account suspension.

Microsoft Account Team

email.subject: Payment received for order #prod_12345
email.body:
Payment Received

Your Stripe account has received a payment.

Amount: $99.99
Date: 2025-04-20
Order: prod_12345

View transaction details: https://dashboard.stripe.com/payments/pi_123

Stripe Payments

email.subject: Unusual Account Activity Detected
email.body:
Dear Account Holder,

We have detected an unusual transaction on your Wells Fargo account. Please review and confirm this activity.

Click here to review: http://wellsfargo-alerts.com/review

Wells Fargo Security

email.subject: You have a new job opportunity
email.body:
Hi User,

A recruiter has viewed your profile and would like to connect. View the opportunity: https://linkedin.com/jobs/view/12345

LinkedIn Recruiter

email.subject: Google Account Security Alert
email.body:
Your Google Account has been flagged for unusual activity. Please verify your account details to keep it secure.

Verify Account: http://google-security.info/verify?account=user@gmail.com

Google Security Team

email.subject: Slack workspace security report
email.body:
Weekly Security Report for your Slack workspace.

Active users: 42
New sign-ins: 3
Suspicious activity: None

View full report: https://app.slack.com/admin/security

Slack Security

email.subject: Bank of America - Immediate Action Required
email.body:
Dear Customer,

Your Bank of America account has been temporarily limited due to suspicious activity. To restore full access, please verify your information within 24 hours.

Click here: http://bankofamerica-secure.com/verify

Bank of America

email.subject: Your Dropbox file is ready
email.body:
Your file conversion is complete. Access your file: https://www.dropbox.com/files/12345

Dropbox Support
